commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Have you not heard long ago how I have done it, and of ancient times that I have formed it. now have I brought it to pass, that you should lay waste fortified cities into ruinous heaps. I have formed it All thy exploits, in which thou takest pride, are no more than what I have decreed; and are not to be ascribed to thy wisdom or strength, but to my will and ordinance: who have give to thee to take and destroy so many fenced cities, and to carry terror wherever thou comest. Literally, "ruin of hills. "(Challoner) Protestants, "Now have I brought it to pass, that thou shouldest be to lay waste fenced cities into ruinous heaps.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Heaps of ruin: Literally ruin of the hills.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Have you not heard long ago how I have done it, and of ancient times that I have formed it. now have I brought it to pass, that you should lay waste fortified cities into ruinous heaps. I have formed it: All thy exploits, in which thou takest pride, are no more than what I have decreed; and are not to be ascribed to thy wisdom or strength, but to my will and ordinance: who have given to thee to take and destroy so many fenced cities, and to carry terror wherever thou comest.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
